name: AI Project Planner
description: A SaaS application that generates structured software development plans using AI based on a project idea provided by the user.

phases.name: Project Setup
phases.description: Initialize the project repository and configure the development environment.

milestones.title: Repository Initialization
milestones.description: Create the project repository and initialize the base project structure.

tasks.title: Initialize Next.js application
tasks.purpose: Create the base web application structure for the project planner.

tasks.title: Initialize Git repository
tasks.purpose: Enable version control and collaboration for the project.

tasks.title: Create initial project folder structure
tasks.purpose: Organize components, hooks, API routes, and utilities for maintainability.

milestones.title: Development Tooling
milestones.description: Configure code quality tools and environment configuration.

tasks.title: Install ESLint and Prettier
tasks.purpose: Maintain consistent code formatting and catch potential issues early.

tasks.title: Configure environment variable management
tasks.purpose: Store API keys and environment-specific settings securely.

tasks.title: Add project scripts for development and build
tasks.purpose: Simplify development workflows with predefined commands.
